cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Latest update does not detect HTC Vive, had to opt into the 'previous release' to get it to run.
title: Tilt Brush

notes: Current tilt brush version must have an issue because it wouldn't launch at all. It said it was unable to detect a VR headset. I selected "previous version" in Tilt Brush properties under the BETAS menu and it started working without any issues that I noticed, although I haven't tried very much yet
title: Tilt Brush

notes: Run well after using Proton 4.11. With Proton 4.2 Tilt Brush was unable to detect the headset. Works fine with minor performance issues.
title: Tilt Brush
